title: Solo Leveling ARISE OVERDRIVE
shortDescription: Solo Leveling, the webtoon with 14.3 billion views worldwide, is now an action RPG game! Help our hero grow from his humble E-Rank beginnings.
detailedDescriptionHtml:
[The Beloved Story Retold with Brand-new Chapters]

Join Sung Jinwoo on his journey to become the world's strongest hunter!

Dive into both the original story from the webtoon and new adventures exclusive to the game!

[Elevated Action]

Experience dynamic, gorgeously animated combat that evolves with your choice of weapons and skill combos!

Dodge monster attacks with Extreme Evasion and land a powerful counterattack with the perfect parry.

Build your own unique combat style through a skill tree that branches into 8 different job advancements!

[Sung Jinwoo, the Monarch of Shadows]

Overwhelm the battlefield with abilities unlocked through your Monarch's Awakening.

Experience Sung Jinwoo's transformation into the [Ultimate Monarch of Shadows],

succeeding Ashborn and growing through a Monarch Awakening system that adapts to every combat situation.

[4-Player Co-op Raids]

Defeat the mighty Commanders in co-op raids.

Choose between fighting as Jinwoo or as a party of other hunters and take them out!

[A Robust Weapon Crafting System]

Defeat monsters in the field and use the various items you obtain from them to craft weapons!

Make and use powerful weapons from the original webtoon like Kasaka's Venom Fang and the Demon King's Daggers!
aboutTheGameHtml:
[The Beloved Story Retold with Brand-new Chapters]

Join Sung Jinwoo on his journey to become the world's strongest hunter!

Dive into both the original story from the webtoon and new adventures exclusive to the game!

[Elevated Action]

Experience dynamic, gorgeously animated combat that evolves with your choice of weapons and skill combos!

Dodge monster attacks with Extreme Evasion and land a powerful counterattack with the perfect parry.

Build your own unique combat style through a skill tree that branches into 8 different job advancements!

[Sung Jinwoo, the Monarch of Shadows]

Overwhelm the battlefield with abilities unlocked through your Monarch's Awakening.

Experience Sung Jinwoo's transformation into the [Ultimate Monarch of Shadows],

succeeding Ashborn and growing through a Monarch Awakening system that adapts to every combat situation.

[4-Player Co-op Raids]

Defeat the mighty Commanders in co-op raids.

Choose between fighting as Jinwoo or as a party of other hunters and take them out!

[A Robust Weapon Crafting System]

Defeat monsters in the field and use the various items you obtain from them to craft weapons!

Make and use powerful weapons from the original webtoon like Kasaka's Venom Fang and the Demon King's Daggers!
supportedLanguagesHtml:
English*, Korean*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Indonesian, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Thai, Portuguese - Brazil, Danish, Dutch, Malay, Norwegian, Polish, Swedish, Turkish, Filipino
*languages with full audio support

pcRequirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11 (64-bit Required)
  • Processor: i5 4460 3.2 GHz Over or AMD equivalent
  • Memory: 12 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce GTX™ 1050 Over
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 40 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: SSD recommended
pcRequirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11 (64-bit Required)
  • Processor: i5-9400 2.9 GHz Over or AMD equivalent
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce GTX™ 2060 Over
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 40 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: SSD recommended

newsItems.title: Known Issues
newsItems.author: OVERDRIVE
newsItems.contents: [p]Greetings, Hunters.[/p][p]This is Solo Leveling: ARISE OVERDRIVE team.[/p][p][/p][p]We would like to inform you of the currently known issues in the game.[/p][p][/p][p]We are currently investigating and working to fix the root cause of the issues. [/p][p]Once the issues are resolved, we will notify you through this notice.[/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p][b]📌 Resolved Issues[/b][/p][p]- An issue where sound is not played when tapping Goto Ryuji in the Menu - Hunter tab[/p][p]- An issue where certain Co-op play-related Steam Achievements cannot be completed [/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]We apologize for the inconvenience and will do our best to resolve the issues as soon as possible. [/p][p][/p][p]Thank you.[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45010824/4dcb0d16ae3881f51af005253c39c6b98d061fef.png"][/img][/p]

newsItems.title: 6/18 (Thu) Patch Notice(Added on 6/18(Thu) 08:30)
newsItems.author: OVERDRIVE
newsItems.contents: [p]Greetings, Hunters.[/p][p]This is [b]Solo Leveling: ARISE OVERDRIVE[/b] team.[/p][p][/p][p]A patch has been applied to the game for a better gameplay experience.[/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p][b]📌Fixed Issues (Added on 6/18(Thu) 08:30)[/b][/p][p]- An issue where the stats for Sung Jinwoo's weapons—Razor Frost, Ennio's Roar, and Winchester Roke—were incorrectly applied. [/p][p]- An issue where an error pop-up is displayed when accessing the Mailbox after setting the game to a specific language. [/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]* To apply the patch, please completely close the game and restart it.[/p][p][/p][p]Thank you.[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45010824/4dcb0d16ae3881f51af005253c39c6b98d061fef.png"][/img][/p]

newsItems.title: 📢New Paid DLC Update
newsItems.author: OVERDRIVE
newsItems.contents:
[p]Hello, Hunters. This is the Solo Leveling: ARISE Overdrive team. [/p][p][/p][p]A brand-new paid DLC package has been released to bring even more variety and excitement to your battles! [/p][p][/p][p]This package features a new Hunter to reinforce your squad, a powerful new weapon, and fresh new costumes to change up your style. [/p][p][/p][p]We hope you experience a whole new level of action with these new gears and allies.[/p][p][/p][p]Please check below for more details regarding the update. [/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/4710940/_/"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]📢[b] New DLC Contents[/b][/p][p]※ The following weapons, characters, and costumes can be obtained by purchasing the new DLC package. [/p][p][/p][p]🎁[b]New Weapon for Sung Jinwoo[/b][/p][table equalcells="1" colwidth=""][tr][th][p align="center"][b]Razor Frost[/b][/p][/th][/tr][tr][td][p][img src="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images//45010824/5022a19af3af1d22fbce6e1df2219659f6b2ea03.png" style="border: none; -webkit-user-drag: none; display: block; max-width: 100%; position: relative; z-index: -1;"][/img][/p][/td][/tr][/table][p][/p][p]🎁[b]New Hunters Added[/b][/p][p]- Upon purchasing the DLC, the new Hunters will be dispatched along with their exclusive weapons: \[The Path a Hero Must Take] and \[Distorted Dreams]. 
- This package also includes the respective Hunter Profile Icons.[/p][table equalcells="1" colwidth=""][tr][th][p align="center"][b]Tawata Kanae & Goto Ryuji[/b][/p][/th][/tr][tr][td][p][/p][p][img src="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images//45010824/777746ce93d04a5c271e4cfbc5a93f7db0889c78.png" style="border: none; -webkit-user-drag: none; display: block; max-width: 100%; position: relative; z-index: -1;"][/img][/p][/td][/tr][/table][p][/p][p]🎁[b]New Costumes Added[/b] [/p][p][b]▶ Tawata Kanae 
[/b]- This package includes various hairstyles, featuring the new hair style \[Moment of Splendor].[/p][table equalcells="1" colwidth=""][tr][th][p align="center"][b]\[Strictness] (4 Types)[/b][/p][/th][/tr][tr][td][p][/p][p][img src="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images//45010824/7e3ccea3fcad29b88323f3f278fc34e0ee350698.png" style="border: none; -webkit-user-drag: none; display: block; max-width: 100%; position: relative; z-index: -1;"][/img][/p][p][img src="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images//45010824/88ee06b673568ce54b5a5684334229e7cd1bc978.png" style="border: none; -webkit-user-drag: none; display: block; max-width: 100%; position: relative; z-index: -1;"][/img][/p][/td][/tr][/table][p][/p][table equalcells="1" colwidth=""][tr][th][p align="center"][b]\[Criminal Smoothness] (2 Types)[/b][/p][/th][/tr][tr][td][p][/p][p][img src="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images//45010824/50f8886f0413be6c99d6c425429695594a4e4a07.png" style="border: none; -webkit-user-drag: none; display: block; max-width: 100%; position: relative; z-index: -1;"][/img][/p][/td][/tr][/table][p][/p][p][b]▶ Goto Ryuji 
[/b]- This package includes various hairstyles, featuring the new hair style \[Hour of the Wolf].[/p][table equalcells="1" colwidth=""][tr][th][p align="center"][b]\[Precision] (4 Types)[/b][/p][/th][/tr][tr][td][p][/p][p][img src="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images//45010824/6267edb8d6c73b8436090a7af1a5d202a4037792.png" style="border: none; -webkit-user-drag: none; display: block; max-width: 100%; position: relative; z-index: -1;"][/img][/p][/td][/tr][/table][p][/p][table equalcells="1" colwidth="408"][tr][th colwidth="408"][p align="center"][b]\[Discipline][/b][/p][/th][/tr][tr][td colwidth="408"][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45010824/6529799d2c1ba05444c8dfc365ce5eb08b3cb17f.png"][/img][/p][/td][/tr][/table][p][/p][p][b]▶ Special Skins Included[/b][/p][table equalcells="1" colwidth=""][tr][th][p align="center"][b]\[Crimson Carnival] &  \[Cold Eclipse][/b][/p][/th][/tr][tr][td][p][/p][p][img src="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images//45010824/ee2e346de56c266634de7b0497e72b8a564c921f.png" style="border: none; -webkit-user-drag: none; display: block; max-width: 100%; position: relative; z-index: -1;"][/img][/p][/td][/tr][/table][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]We will continue to do our absolute best to provide better services and a more enjoyable experience for all our Hunters. [/p][p]
Thank you. [/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45010824/4dcb0d16ae3881f51af005253c39c6b98d061fef.png"][/img][/p]

newsItems.title: 📢 [New Update Special] Extended Benefits! 40% Discount Now Live!
newsItems.author: OVERDRIVE
newsItems.contents:
[p]Greetings, Hunters! [/p][p][/p][p]In celebration of our 6/18 update and the 2026 Steam Summer Sale,
We’re thrilled to announce a 40% special discount for OVERDRIVE! [/p][p][/p][p]This is the perfect chance to explore the intense new contents,
including the Jeju Island Episode and brand-new weapons. [/p][p][/p][p]If you haven’t joined the battlefield of OVERDRIVE yet, 
grab it now at its lowest price ever! [/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45010824/f60410c5d88e17b643c62407c7db9c4a24272f01.jpg"][/img][/p][p]⏰6/17, 17:00 – 7/9, 17:00 (UTC) 
[/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/2373990/"][/dynamiclink][/p][p]We will continue to do our best to provide you with the ultimate action experience.[/p][p][/p][p]- The OVERDRIVE Team [/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45010824/4dcb0d16ae3881f51af005253c39c6b98d061fef.png"][/img][/p][p]
[/p]

newsItems.title: Maintenance Notice(Completed)
newsItems.author: OVERDRIVE
newsItems.contents:
[p]Greetings, Hunters.[/p][p]This is Solo Leveling: ARISE OVERDRIVE team.[/p][p][/p][p]Update maintenance is scheduled for 6/18 (Thu).
* Planned Maintenance Time: 6/18 (Thu) 01:00 - 03:00 (UTC)   
* Game access will be restricted during maintenance. Please close the game before maintenance begins.[/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][h3][b]1. Update[/b][/h3][p][b]● Complete Offline Mode Added 
[/b]- Players can now enjoy full offline gameplay without any additional data downloads. [/p][p]▶ All necessary gameplay data will be applied upon installation, allowing you to play immediately without a server connection. [/p][p]※ Please note that for the Xbox PC version, an initial online connection is required for a license check, and subsequent periodic online connections will be needed for license renewal. [/p][p][/p][p][b]● New Content & Story 
[/b]- The new Main Story, \[Jeju Island Chapter (Chapter 11)], has been added. [/p][p]- New world content related to the Jeju Island Chapter has been added to the World Map. ▶ 2 Gates, 1 Dungeon Break, 2 Instance Dungeons, 1 Encore Dungeon[/p][p]- A new Story Repeat Mode has been added, where you can obtain \[The Frozen Darkness].[/p][p]- A new boss, \[Ant King], has been added to the \[Workshop of Brilliant Light].[/p][p]- Along with the new story update, \[Challenge Chapter 11] and its related new achievements and profile items have been added.[/p][p]- Even if you are progressing through the \[Incapable of Evaluation] difficulty, if there is an uncleared regular new chapter, the resume buttons will be displayed separately on the World Map menu. [/p][p]▶ Red Button: Continue the current \[Incapable of Evaluation] difficulty stage[/p][p]▶ Blue Button: Start from the new regular chapter with no clear data[/p][p]▶ If all regular chapters are cleared and only the \[Incapable of Evaluation] difficulty remains, only a single button will be displayed as before. 
[/p][p][b]● New Weapons, Shadows, and Hunter Archive Added[/b][/p][p]- 2 new  Sung Jinwoo Exclusive Weapons have been added. [/p][p]▶ \[Winchester Roke], \[Ennio's Roar]: These can be obtained through the new weapon crafting tree.[/p][p]- A new Shadow, \[Beru], has been added. [/p][p]- \[Goto Ryuji] and \[Tawata Kanae] have been added to the Hunter Archive. [/p][p][/p][p][b]● New Costumes & Items Added 
[/b]- New costumes have been added.[/p][p]▶ 1 new costume for Sung Jinwoo: \[A Wish Come True][/p][p]- New artifacts and unique effects have been added. [/p][p]▶ The new artifacts can be obtained upon clearing the \[Ant King] in the Workshop of Brilliant Light.[/p][p]- New alchemy materials and effects have been added. [/p][p]- New drinks have been added. [/p][p][/p][p][b]● Sung Jinwoo Growth & System Expansion 
[/b]- Sung Jinwoo's maximum level and Monarch level have been expanded. [/p][p]- A new skill tree for Sung Jinwoo has been added, and the balance of the existing skill tree has been adjusted. [/p][p]- In accordance with the Sung Jinwoo level cap expansion, Gate Dispatch levels have also been expanded. [/p][p][/p][p][b]● New Paid DLC Added [/b][/p][p]※ All components listed below can only be obtained by purchasing paid DLC packs. [/p][p]- A new weapon exclusive to Sung Jinwoo, \[Razer Frost], has been added. 
- New Hunters, \[Goto Ryuji] and \[Tawata Kanae], join the roster. 
▶ Along with the new Hunters, their exclusive weapons, \[Distorted Dreams] and \[The Path a Hero Must Take], can be obtained. [/p][p]▶ The respective Hunter profile icons are included in these packs. [/p][p]- New Hunter skins have been added. [/p][p]▶ Goto Ryuji Skins: 4 types of \[Precision], 1 type of \[Discipline], 1 type of \[Cold Eclipse][/p][p]▶ Tawata Kanae Skins: 4 types of \[Strictness], 2 types of \[Criminal Smoothness], 1 type of \[Crimson Carnival] [/p][p] ※This includes 21 new hairstyles for Goto Ryuji and 22 new hairstyles for Tawata Kanae. [/p][p][/p][h3][b]2. Improvements [/b][/h3][p][b]● Balance Adjustments [/b][/p][p]- Gold and Hunt Coin clear rewards for World Map content have been generally increased. [/p][p]- Certain skills for Lee Bora, Alicia Blanche, and Amamiya Mirei have been buffed. [/p][p]
[b]● Miscellaneous & QoL [/b][/p][p]- During the Chapter 9 Red Gate \[Ashura] battle, the camera-lock feature during the boss's specific skill use has been removed, and the knockback-and-fly-away pattern has been improved to no longer trigger. [/p][p]- A Crafting Wishlist feature has been added. [/p][p]- The active Drink Buffs can now be checked from the Quick Menu, Story Resume, Content Entrance UI, and Multi-Lobby. [/p][p]- Voice lines have been added for Sung Jinwoo when moving across maps, interacting with objects, or acquiring items above a certain rarity.[/p][p]- The last connection status (Online/Offline) will now be saved to the local save file, ensuring the same status is maintained by default upon the next launch. [/p][p][/p][h3][b]3. Bug Fixes [/b][/h3][p][b]● Story & Content Fixes [/b][/p][p]- Fixed an issue where Sung Jinwoo's costume was not correctly applied or graphic anomalies occurred during cutscenes and dialogue sequences in \[Incapable of Evaluation] Difficulty Chapter 2. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where the name of a specific NPC was incorrectly displayed on the battle preparation field during story progression. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where certain target images were displayed as cropped in the \[Jinho's Strike Squad] Association Bounty pop-up window. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where a server error pop-up would occur in \[Jinho's Strike Squad] when re-deploying a Hunter who was previously deployed to a Gate while claimable Gate rewards still remained. [/p][p]- Fixed a delay issue where newly acquired skills were not instantly reflected in the Skill Tree UI. [/p][p]- Fixed an audio environment issue where sound would not output if the game was launched without a sound device connected and a device was connected later. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where the shadows of certain NPCs placed on the 2nd floor were incorrectly projected onto the 1st floor. [/p][p][/p][p][b]● Multiplayer [/b][/p][p]- Fixed an issue where a draw notification toast message was displayed when the opponent disconnected during a PVP Duel. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where characters would intermittently move while the Synchro Chain animation was playing. [/p][p][/p][p][b]● Hunters & Skins [/b][/p][p]- Fixed an issue where the 'New' notification would persist in the Sung Jinwoo Costume menu even after the item had been acquired. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where the 'Experience' costume was missing from the costume selection list even when held in the inventory. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where the button icon guide for Equip/Export would disappear upon re-entering the skin/hair customization screen after using a gamepad controller to place the cursor on an unowned costume and pressing back. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where the cursor focus would intermittently fail to position correctly on the currently equipped skin when entering the screen for each skin part using a gamepad. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where the gamepad key-mapping guide would not display in the Costume menu until a costume that could be exported was selected. [/p][p][/p][p][b]● Artifacts & Rewards Fixes [/b][/p][p]- Fixed an issue where the count would not accumulate correctly when multiple unique effects of the 'Apex' artifact expired simultaneously. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where the equipment setup was intermittently applied incorrectly when using the preset feature while swapping artifacts between Sung Jinwoo and Hunters. [/p][p]▶ Please note that due to this fix, duplicate equipped artifacts may be unequipped. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue so that unique effect information for artifacts is now correctly displayed on the Recommended Set Auto-Equip pop-up window and the Stage Results screen. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where the checkmark on the warning pop-up window was obscured by the gamepad key-mapping guide when selling high-grade artifacts using a gamepad. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where the EXP gauge on the Stage Clear Results screen would intermittently fill up to abnormal values. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where unique effects were incorrectly displayed on artifacts that do not have any unique effects applied. [/p][p][/p][p][b]● UI & Other Fixes [/b][/p][p]- Fixed an issue where nicknames could be set using certain blank space characters. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where an error pop-up would intermittently display upon logging into the game, causing login delays. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where the cursor would disappear if the tab was changed while the alignment/sorting menu was open on the Weapon Equipment, Weapon, or Artifact screens during gamepad operation. [/p][p]- Fixed an issue where certain characters would get stuck in the escalator area within the lobby and could not come down. [/p][p]- \[French] Fixed an issue where the system string code was directly exposed in the Cola item description. [/p][p]- \[German] Fixed an issue where text line breaks were awkwardly displayed within the Jinho's Strike Squad difficulty settings window. [/p][p]- \[Indonesian] Fixed an issue where the text displayed in the Costume menu overlapped with the gamepad button icons. [/p][p]- \[Russian] Fixed a layout issue where the font size of certain buttons within the Hunter Costume menu was displayed too small. [/p][p]- \[Traditional Chinese] Fixed an issue where line breaks were not applied to artifact descriptions. [/p][p]- Added support for Polish, Dutch, Filipino, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, Malay, and Turkish. [/p][p]※ Please note that these languages are provided based on AI translation, so some expressions may feel unnatural. We plan to continuously improve the translations. [/p][p][/p][hr][/hr][p][/p][p]We will continue to do our best as the Overdrive team to ensure a smooth and enjoyable gaming experience. [/p][p][/p][p]Thank you. [/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45010824/4dcb0d16ae3881f51af005253c39c6b98d061fef.png"][/img]
[/p]
